savage_analysis.roast_summary: Every single command violates CLAUDE.md complexity standards. Average violation: 353%. This isn't automation, it's abstraction masturbation.
recommendations: Stop creating frameworks for simple tasks

generate-thinking-command.md.title: The Meta-Monster Factory
generate-thinking-command.md.roast: A command that generates commands with thinking blocks? That's like hiring a consultant to hire consultants. 12/5 complexity score means you've built a Rube Goldberg machine where a simple template would suffice.
generate-thinking-command.md.evidence: 137 lines to generate what could be a 20-line template
generate-thinking-command.md.fix: Use a simple template file. Skip the meta-abstraction.

adhd-morning-assistant.md.title: The JavaScript Pretender
adhd-morning-assistant.md.roast: 309 lines of pseudo-JavaScript masquerading as a command. 28/5 complexity score - that's not intelligent, that's overengineering with anxiety. This isn't a command, it's a mock startup pitch deck.
adhd-morning-assistant.md.evidence: Fake JavaScript promises, mock function calls, imaginary APIs
adhd-morning-assistant.md.fix: Write actual code or use simple templates. Stop the pseudo-code theater.

ultrathink-pure-xml.md.title: The XML Monastery
ultrathink-pure-xml.md.roast: 472 lines of XML thinking phases. 15/5 complexity score for what? Making thinking... more complex? This has more phases than a moon cycle and about as much practical utility.
ultrathink-pure-xml.md.evidence: Three-phase workflow for simple problem solving
ultrathink-pure-xml.md.fix: One thinking block. One solution. Skip the ceremonial complexity.

adhd-context-switch.md.title: The Context Paranoia Engine
adhd-context-switch.md.roast: 399 lines to switch between tasks. 22/5 complexity score to save context? Enterprise-grade over-engineering for what should be a simple note-taking operation. You've built a nuclear reactor to light a candle.
adhd-context-switch.md.evidence: Git stashing, JSON state management, multiple storage systems
adhd-context-switch.md.fix: Write a quick note. Change tasks. Revolutionary, I know.

ultrathink-interactive.md.title: The Frankenstein's Monster of Commands
ultrathink-interactive.md.roast: 673 lines. 35/5 complexity score - 700% over the limit! This isn't a command, it's a small operating system. Interactive refinement with ULTRATHINK integration? You've created the Inception of command design. We need to go deeper... into simpler solutions.
ultrathink-interactive.md.evidence: Most complex command ever analyzed, multiple framework integrations
ultrathink-interactive.md.fix: Delete 90% of this. Start with: ask question, get answer, provide solution.

adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.title: The Hyperfocus Helicopter Parent
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.roast: 457 lines to manage focus sessions. 24/5 complexity score to... set a timer? This has more boundary conditions than international law. It's like hiring a project manager to manage your project manager.
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.evidence: Multiple timer systems, pattern analysis, environmental management
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.fix: Use a Pomodoro timer app. Seriously.

estimated_costs.maintenance_overhead: HIGH - Complex abstractions require constant updates

actual_benefits.time_saved: NEGATIVE - More complex than manual execution
actual_benefits.error_reduction: QUESTIONABLE - Complexity increases error surface area

cost_benefit_analysis.roi_calculation: NEGATIVE ROI - Costs exceed benefits by orders of magnitude

comparison_with_baseline.verdict: Commands are slower, more expensive, and less reliable than manual execution
